**Acceptance Criteria**

Pass. `jit issue search --label <ns:val>` is supported without a positional query via `query: Option<String>` in [crates/jit/src/cli.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/cli.rs:356), and `main.rs` permits no query when any real filter is present in [crates/jit/src/main.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/main.rs:663). Label filtering is ANDed in [crates/jit/src/commands/search.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/commands/search.rs:81). Integration coverage exists in [crates/jit/tests/issue_search_label_filter_tests.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/tests/issue_search_label_filter_tests.rs:109).

**Architecture And Separation Of Concerns**

Pass. CLI parsing and argument policy stay in `cli.rs`/`main.rs`; command orchestration and filtering stay in `commands/search.rs`; persistence remains behind `IssueStore` through `self.storage.list_issues()` in [crates/jit/src/commands/search.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/commands/search.rs:7). No domain/storage boundary violation found.

**Functional Paradigm**

Pass. The search path uses iterator filtering for the text query and label predicates in [crates/jit/src/commands/search.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/commands/search.rs:10) and [crates/jit/src/commands/search.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/commands/search.rs:82). No concerning imperative side effects were introduced.

**Correctness And Invariants**

Pass. The change is read-only search behavior, so it does not affect atomic writes, event logging, gate transitions, PID handling, or unsafe invariants. Label filters are validated before searching in [crates/jit/src/main.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/main.rs:676), preserving the required `namespace:value` format.

**Safety**

Pass. `#![deny(unsafe_code)]` remains enforced in [crates/jit/src/main.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/main.rs:14), and no unsafe code was introduced in the reviewed diff.

**Testing**

Pass. The provided cargo-ci gate passed: `fmt: ok`, `clippy: ok`, `test: 2228 passed, 0 failed, 12 ignored`. I did not rerun tests because the issue has a succeeded cargo-ci gate. New integration tests cover label-only search, multiple labels, filter combinations, query plus label, empty invocation error, plain positional regression, null JSON query, and invalid label format.

**Error Handling**

Pass. Fallible parsing and label validation return contextual `Result` errors, including `invalid --label filter '<label>'` in [crates/jit/src/main.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/main.rs:677). No new `unwrap()` or `expect()` appears in library code from this change.

**CLI Contract**

Pass. `issue search` retains `--json`; the new no-query label path serializes `query: null` and compact/full issue output through the existing JSON path in [crates/jit/src/main.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/main.rs:691).

**Documentation**

Pass. CLI docs were updated with label filtering, optional query behavior, JSON shape, and error behavior in [docs/reference/cli-commands.md](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/docs/reference/cli-commands.md:942). The updated public `search_issues_with_filters` API has doc comments and an example in [crates/jit/src/commands/search.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/commands/search.rs:27).

**Prior Review Feedback**

Pass. `run_history` is empty, so there are no prior review findings to verify.

**Jit Issue Management**

Pass. The listed dependency `838483f3` is `done`. The issue has a passed `cargo-ci` gate, and the evidence shows no test or lint failures.

VERDICT: PASS
